## SigMap commands

| When | Command |
|------|---------|
| Before answering a question about code | `sigmap ask "<your question>"` |
| After changing config or source dirs | `sigmap validate` |
| To verify an AI answer is grounded | `sigmap judge --response <file>` |

### .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/pull_request_template.md
```
h2 Description
h2 Type of Change
h2 Related Issues
h2 Changes Made
h2 Testing
h3 Test Environment
h3 Test Cases
h2 Breaking Changes
h2 Documentation
h2 Checklist
h2 Package Building
h2 Screenshots/Output
h2 Additional Notes
```
